input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.2.1
            TITLE: the anti intrusion plate must be one of the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.2.1: The Anti Intrusion Plate must be one of the following:
F.8.2.1 The Anti Intrusion Plate must be one of the following: 
a. 1.5 mm minimum thickness solid steel 
b. 4.0 mm minimum thickness solid aluminum plate
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 44 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
c. Composite material per F.8.3

final_answer: The Anti Intrusion Plate must be one of the following: a. 1.5 mm minimum thickness solid steel b. 4.0 mm minimum thickness solid aluminum plate c. Composite material per F.8.3
